identify_pain.narrative: Customer_Business_Problem__c records real buyer pain: sourcing and procurement processes are 'fully manual, with no system in place,' and Monroe wants a 'structured three bids to buy procurement process.' This is a genuine, SF-recorded pain statement, but it is a paraphrase rather than a verbatim buyer quote (no transcript exists), and it has not been deepened or reconfirmed since the deal was qualified on 18 May 2026 — the single positive call with Maria Camarre that day carries no logged notes.

paper_process.narrative: No paper process exists yet. Current_Contract_Expiration__c and Existing_vendor__c are blank; the deal is pre-RFP and pre-demo, well before any contracting motion would begin.

economic_buyer.narrative: No economic buyer or executive sponsor is identified or engaged (Executive_Sponsor_Identified__c = false, X10a_Sponsor__c and Who_will_approve_budget__c both blank). The only two Opportunity Contact Roles are Nona MCIPS (Procurement Leader) and Maria Camarre (Project Procurement Specialist), both logged as Evaluator, not budget owners. Monroe Energy's account record shows several senior titles (a Chief Operating Officer, two Chief Financial Officer entries, a VP General Counsel) but none carry an Opportunity Contact Role or appear in any task or call tied to this deal's scope.

decision_process.narrative: What_is_the_decision_process__c, Mandate__c, and Decision_Maker_Name_Title__c are all blank and Decision_Maker_Identified__c = false. The Next Step trail shows the deal owner repeatedly asking Monroe to 'release the RFP' and confirm a 'timeline' (6/29/26 entry) without a reply, meaning even the shape of the process (RFP-led vs. informal) is still unconfirmed by the buyer.

decision_criteria.narrative: Business_Requirements__c and Top_Challenges_Priorities__c are both blank and Shoe_Fit_Criteria_Met__c = false. No use-case criteria, BRD, or RFP scope has been shared or captured; the deal has not reached a demo or requirements-gathering session.
